heading: Settlement and adjustment of claims
label: 7516 Settlement and adjustment of claims
notes: Effective DateSection effective and to be implemented no later than , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1991 Amendment note under .Feb. 1, 1992section 1101(d)(1) of Pub. L. 102–237section 1421 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective and to be implemented no later than , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1991 Amendment note under .Feb. 1, 1992section 1101(d)(1) of Pub. L. 102–237section 1421 of this title

children.text: determine the amount of, settle, and adjust any claim arising under this chapter; and
waive such a claim if the Secretary determines that to do so will serve the purposes of this chapter.

children.heading: Litigation
children.label: b Litigation
children.text: Nothing contained in this section shall be construed to diminish the authority of the Attorney General of the United States under to conduct litigation on behalf of the United States.section 516 of title 28
